channel.title: Microbiome Digest
channel.description: Daily automated digest of microbiome research
channel.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of microbiome research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-12
item.description: Amelie Baud's team at the European Molecular Biology Laboratory has developed a phenome-wide genetic framework to uncover the mechanisms behind indirect genetic effects, or IGE. | Recurrent kidney stone disease is not just a matter of mineral imbalance in the urine. | The researchers collected stool samples from 114 people: 37 with recurrent calcium oxalate stones, 38 with a single stone episode, and 39 healthy controls.
item.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
item.itunes:summary: Amelie Baud's team at the European Molecular Biology Laboratory has developed a phenome-wide genetic framework to uncover the mechanisms behind indirect genetic effects, or IGE. | Recurrent kidney stone disease is not just a matter of mineral imbalance in the urine. | The researchers collected stool samples from 114 people: 37 with recurrent calcium oxalate stones, 38 with a single stone episode, and 39 healthy controls.
